entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop targeted by the head bug Calocoris angustatus

entities.name: CALOCORIS ANGUSTATUS
entities.description: The sorghum head bug, a pest causing damage to sorghum

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum cultivars to withstand or repel the head bug

entities.name: CULTIVAR PREFERENCE
entities.description: The preference or nonpreference of head bugs for feeding on specific sorghum cultivars

entities.name: REDUCED OVIPOSITION
entities.description: A component of resistance where fewer eggs are laid by the head bug

entities.name: POST-EMBRYONIC DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth period of nymphs after hatching

entities.name: NYMPHAL SURVIVAL
entities.description: The rate at which nymphs survive to adulthood

entities.name: FOOD UTILIZATION
entities.description: The efficiency with which nymphs use the food they consume

entities.name: CONSUMPTION INDEX
entities.description: A measure of the amount of food consumed by the head bug

entities.name: GROWTH RATE
entities.description: The speed at which the head bug increases in size or weight

entities.name: IS 2761
entities.description: A sorghum cultivar showing nonpreference and low food utilization

entities.name: IS 9692
entities.description: A sorghum cultivar showing nonpreference and lower nymphal survival and weight

entities.name: IS 17610
entities.description: A sorghum cultivar showing nonpreference, reduced oviposition, and lower nymphal survival and weight

entities.name: IS 17618
entities.description: A sorghum cultivar showing nonpreference and reduced oviposition

entities.name: IS 17645
entities.description: A sorghum cultivar showing nonpreference, reduced oviposition, and lower nymphal survival

entities.name: IS 6984
entities.description: A sorghum cultivar showing low food utilization

entities.name: CSH 5
entities.description: A susceptible sorghum cultivar

entities.name: SWARNA
entities.description: A susceptible sorghum cultivar

entities.name: MULTI-CHOICE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Experimental setup where insects can choose from multiple cultivars

entities.name: TWO-CHOICE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Experimental setup where insects can choose between two cultivars

entities.name: NO-CHOICE TESTS
entities.description: Experimental setup where insects are restricted to a single cultivar

entities.name: HEADCAGE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Experimental setup using headcages to restrict insect movement

entities.name: STAGE OF GRAIN DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The age or developmental phase of the sorghum grain
